title: COPY BINARY INTO fails on 6gb file; works fine on 3gb
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_large_file (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, data BYTEA NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE temp_data (foo DOUBLE PRECISION, bar VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO temp_data (foo, bar) SELECT 1.0, 'test' UNION ALL SELECT 2.0, NULL;
key_bug_features: COPY BINARY INTO fails on large file sizes
